DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---SANTIAGO HERNANDEZ.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
